title: Nostalgic Horror
description: A small modpack that makes the game just like the old versions and also making it very scary like an ARG.
body:
**Something's.. here.. in what I thought was my world. He's coming.**

This is a small modpack I made that makes the game almost exactly like the old versions of Minecraft and also making it very scary like an ARG. I won't say what these mods do, but I will tell you this; say hello back.

Help:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Please activate the "Golden Days" texture pack
- Please text me on discord if you are having any issues. (cripplingsouls)

</details>
